articles.title: Trump looms large as Nato grapples with challenge of rearming Europe - BBC
articles.description: The US president's inflammatory words have punctuated the image of unity at this crucial gathering, Security Correspondent Frank Gardner writes.
articles.content: Referring to the UK prime minister, Trump said: "He said no we'll help after the war is over. I said I don't want that kind of help. We didn't need any help at all. In a way I was testing people, I w… [+135 chars]
